summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 SEO-optimized blog articles for AI discoverability. All 16 backend API tests passed. All 4 frontend blog pages verified working with correct content, structured data, and product links.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for blog features
seed_data_creation: Blog posts seeded via /app/backend/scripts/seed_blog.py on backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog feature fully implemented and tested. 4 SEO-optimized articles seeded: (1) best-charcoal-free-incense-india-2026, (2) how-to-use-arabian-bakhoor-at-home, (3) best-incense-for-meditation-yoga, (4) charcoal-free-vs-regular-agarbatti-difference. All have Article structured data with speakable, inLanguage (en-IN), keywords, and author (Addrika Fragrances). Blog listing at /blog shows all 4 posts with featured images, dates, view counts, and tags. llms.txt includes all 4 blog URLs.

blog_listing_api.details: GET /api/blog/posts returns 4 published posts with correct fields (slug, title, excerpt, tags, featuredImage, createdAt, views, author)

blog_post_detail_api.details: GET /api/blog/posts/{slug} returns full post with content field for all 4 slugs

blog_listing_page.details: /blog shows 'The Addrika Journal' heading, 4 blog cards with featured images (Unsplash), titles, dates, view counts, excerpts, and tags

blog_article_charcoal_free.details: /blog/best-charcoal-free-incense-india-2026 loads with full HTML content, product links to centraders.com, Article structured data with speakable, inLanguage, keywords, author

blog_article_bakhoor.details: /blog/how-to-use-arabian-bakhoor-at-home loads with bakhoor product links (grated-omani-bakhoor, yemeni-bakhoor), Article structured data complete

blog_article_meditation.details: /blog/best-incense-for-meditation-yoga loads with 4 meditation product links (kesar-chandan, oriental-oudh, royal-kewda, mystical-meharishi), Article structured data complete

blog_article_comparison.details: /blog/charcoal-free-vs-regular-agarbatti-difference loads with comparison table HTML, Article structured data complete

llms_txt_blog_urls.details: /llms.txt contains Blog Articles section with all 4 blog URLs

article_structured_data.details: All blog posts have Article JSON-LD with: @type Article, headline, description, image, datePublished, dateModified, author (Addrika Fragrances), publisher, inLanguage (en-IN), keywords, speakable specification

dual_field_naming.details: Blog posts use dual field naming (snake_case for MongoDB + camelCase for frontend): featured_image/featuredImage, created_at/createdAt, updated_at/updatedAt
